description.value: This cantrip creates a burst of light. If you cause the light to burst in front of a single creature, that creature is dazzled for 1 minute unless it makes a successful Fortitude save. Sightless creatures, as well as creatures already dazzled, are not affected by flare. Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder Roleplaying Game Core Rulebook.
